---
title: "plotoptions"
output: html_document
date: "2024-11-06"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(here)
source(here("scripts", "01_packages.R"))
source(here("R", "funcs_plots.R"))
source(here("R", "funcs_data.R"))
source(here("R", "generate_scores_func.R"))
source(here("R", "lshtm_theme.R"))
source(here("R", "plot_casestudy.R"))
source(here("scripts", "datacollect_casestudy.R"))
```

## Plot option 1
### Would be good to plot the CRPS contributions from over, underprediction, dispersion

```{r covid_plots, }
disease <- "covid"

## Load case data
covid_eng <- casestudydata[["covid"]]
covid_eng <- covid_eng |>
  pivot_longer(cols = c("confirm"), names_to = "variable", values_to = "value")
covid_eng$variable <- "reported_cases"

## Load casestudy results — only need "no delay" and "correct" for this plot
res_samples_cs <- read_latest(here("results/casestudy"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_casestudy_latest_all_samples"))
res_id_cs <- read_latest(here("results/casestudy"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_casestudy_latest_all_id"))

res_samples_correct <- res_samples_cs |>
  left_join(res_id_cs, by = c("result_list", "gt", "inc"))


res_samples_correct <- res_samples_correct |>
  filter(inc_period %in% c("no delay", "correct"),
         gen_time %in% c("no delay", "correct"))

## Load weight prior results (vary=both)
res_samples_wp_true <- read_latest(here("results/weightprior"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_weightprior_TRUE_both_latest_all_samples"))
res_samples_wp_false <- read_latest(here("results/weightprior"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_weightprior_FALSE_both_latest_all_samples"))

res_samples_wpt <- res_samples_wp_true |>
  mutate(gen_time = "weight_prior_true",
         inc_period = "weight_prior_true") |>
  rename(timepoint = result_list)
res_samples_wpf <- res_samples_wp_false |>
  mutate(gen_time = "weight_prior_false",
         inc_period = "weight_prior_false") |>
  rename(timepoint = result_list)


## Combine
res_samples <- res_samples_correct |>
  bind_rows(res_samples_wpt) |>
  bind_rows(res_samples_wpf) |>
  select(-any_of(c("result_list", "gt", "inc"))) |>
  filter(type == "forecast")


## Plot
covid_cs_short <- plot_cs_single(res_samples, covid_eng, 4,
                                  title = "COVID-19 in England")
```

## Ebola plots ##
```{r ebola_plots, }
disease <- "ebola"

## Load case data
ebola_confirmed <- casestudydata[["ebola"]]
ebola_confirmed <- ebola_confirmed |>
  mutate(variable = "reported_cases") |>
  rename(value = confirm)

## Load casestudy results
res_samples_cs <- read_latest(here("results/casestudy"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_casestudy_latest_all_samples"))
res_id_cs <- read_latest(here("results/casestudy"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_casestudy_latest_all_id"))

res_samples_correct <- res_samples_cs |>
  left_join(res_id_cs, by = c("result_list", "gt", "inc"))


res_samples_correct <- res_samples_correct |>
  filter(inc_period %in% c("no delay", "correct"),
         gen_time %in% c("no delay", "correct"))

## Load weight prior results
res_samples_wp_true <- read_latest(here("results/weightprior"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_weightprior_TRUE_both_latest_all_samples"))
res_samples_wp_false <- read_latest(here("results/weightprior"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_weightprior_FALSE_both_latest_all_samples"))

res_samples_wpt <- res_samples_wp_true |>
  mutate(gen_time = "weight_prior_true",
         inc_period = "weight_prior_true") |>
  rename(timepoint = result_list)
res_samples_wpf <- res_samples_wp_false |>
  mutate(gen_time = "weight_prior_false",
         inc_period = "weight_prior_false") |>
  rename(timepoint = result_list)


## Combine
res_samples <- res_samples_correct |>
  bind_rows(res_samples_wpt) |>
  bind_rows(res_samples_wpf) |>
  select(-any_of(c("result_list", "gt", "inc"))) |>
  filter(type == "forecast")


## Plot
ebola_cs_short <- plot_cs_single(res_samples, ebola_confirmed, 4,
                                  title = "Ebola in Sierra Leone")
```

## Cholera plots ##

```{r cholera_plots, }
disease <- "cholera"

## Load case data
cholera_yem_tot <- casestudydata[["cholera"]]
cholera_yem_tot <- cholera_yem_tot |>
  mutate(variable = "reported_cases") |>
  rename(value = confirm)

## Load casestudy results
res_samples_cs <- read_latest(here("results/casestudy"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_casestudy_latest_all_samples"))
res_id_cs <- read_latest(here("results/casestudy"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_casestudy_latest_all_id"))

res_samples_correct <- res_samples_cs |>
  left_join(res_id_cs, by = c("result_list", "gt", "inc"))


res_samples_correct <- res_samples_correct |>
  filter(inc_period %in% c("no delay", "correct"),
         gen_time %in% c("no delay", "correct"))

## Load weight prior results
res_samples_wp_true <- read_latest(here("results/weightprior"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_weightprior_TRUE_both_latest_all_samples"))
res_samples_wp_false <- read_latest(here("results/weightprior"),
  paste0("res_", disease, "_weightprior_FALSE_both_latest_all_samples"))

res_samples_wpt <- res_samples_wp_true |>
  mutate(gen_time = "weight_prior_true",
         inc_period = "weight_prior_true") |>
  rename(timepoint = result_list)
res_samples_wpf <- res_samples_wp_false |>
  mutate(gen_time = "weight_prior_false",
         inc_period = "weight_prior_false") |>
  rename(timepoint = result_list)


## Combine
res_samples <- res_samples_correct |>
  bind_rows(res_samples_wpt) |>
  bind_rows(res_samples_wpf) |>
  select(-any_of(c("result_list", "gt", "inc"))) |>
  filter(type == "forecast")


## Plot
cholera_cs_short <- plot_cs_single(res_samples, cholera_yem_tot, 4, "week",
                                    title = "Cholera in Yemen")
```


```{r combine_plots}
# Combine all plots
combined_summary_plot <- plot_grid(covid_cs_short$combined_plots,
                                   ebola_cs_short$combined_plots,
                                   cholera_cs_short$combined_plots,
                                   ncol = 1, align = "hv", axis = "tb",
                                   labels = c("A", "B", "C"))

# Combining plots for poster
library(patchwork)

# Combine plots in a column
covid_timeseries <- covid_cs_short$timeseries
ebola_timeseries <- ebola_cs_short$timeseries
cholera_timeseries <- cholera_cs_short$timeseries

combined_timeseries <- (covid_timeseries / ebola_timeseries / cholera_timeseries) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect") & theme(legend.position = "bottom")

# Combined barchart - gen time
p_covid_gen <- covid_cs_short$barchart_gen_time +
  labs(title = "COVID-19 in England") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_ebola_gen <- ebola_cs_short$barchart_gen_time +
  labs(title = "Ebola in Sierra Leone") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_cholera_gen <- cholera_cs_short$barchart_gen_time +
  labs(title = "Cholera in Yemen") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# 1 row of plots + 1 row reserved for the legend
combined_gen_time <- ((p_covid_gen | p_ebola_gen | p_cholera_gen) / patchwork::guide_area()) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", heights = c(1, 0.12)) &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center"
  )

# Combined barchart - inc period
p_covid_inc <- covid_cs_short$barchart_inc_period +
  labs(title = "COVID-19 in England") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_ebola_inc <- ebola_cs_short$barchart_inc_period +
  labs(title = "Ebola in Sierra Leone") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

p_cholera_inc <- cholera_cs_short$barchart_inc_period +
  labs(title = "Cholera in Yemen") +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# 1 row of plots + 1 row reserved for the legend
combined_inc_period <- ((p_covid_inc | p_ebola_inc | p_cholera_inc) / patchwork::guide_area()) +
  plot_layout(guides = "collect", heights = c(1, 0.12)) &
  theme(
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.justification = "center"
  )
```
